explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: Deafness-hypogonadism syndrome Description: This syndrome is characterized by the association of congenital mixed hearing loss with perilymphatic gusher (Gusher syndrome or DFN3), hypogonadism and abnormal behavior. Phenotypes: Epicanthus; Hypertelorism; Stapes ankylosis; Conductive hearing

explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: Carney complex, type 1 Description: Carney complex (CNC) is characterized by spotty skin pigmentation, endocrine overactivity and myxomas. Phenotypes: Autosomal dominant inheritance; Abnormal morphology of female internal genitalia; Macroorchidism; Tall stature; Ovarian cyst; Tongue nodules
